productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Light Brown Printed T-shirt
description: CompositionLight brown T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the chest and brand tag on the left hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsVintage styling on this classic T-shirt is a sure fire way of upping your style statement in your off-duty ensembles. This tee from locomotive is crafted from soft cotton to offer exemplary comfort which, along with its fashionable branding, makes this a great addition to your wardrobe. Pair it with form fitting denims and casual shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
